UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile information within the SquadForge application, used for identification and personalization.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

avatarUrl.description: URL to the user's profile avatar image.

notificationsEnabled.description: Indicates if the user has globally enabled push notifications.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

Team.title: Team
Team.description: Represents a sports team within the SquadForge application, enabling collaboration and event management.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Team entity.

teamLogoUrl.description: URL to the team's logo image.

teamCode.description: A unique 6-character alphanumeric code used for joining the team.

createdBy.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created this team. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Team)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the team was created.

TeamMembership.title: TeamMembership
TeamMembership.description: Represents a user's specific membership details within a team, including their role and roster information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TeamMembership entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who is a member of the team. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N TeamMembership)

teamId.description: Reference to the Team the user is a member of. (Relationship: Team 1:N TeamMembership)

role.description: The role of the member within the team (Admin or Member).

position.description: The member's position on the team roster.

jerseyNumber.description: The member's jersey number on the team roster.

joinedAt.description: Timestamp when the user officially joined this team.

Post.title: Post
Post.description: Represents a feed post within a team's activity feed, which can include text, an image, or link to an event.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Post entity.

teamId.description: Reference to the Team this post belongs to. (Relationship: Team 1:N Post)

authorId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who authored this post. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Post)

content.description: The main text content of the post.

imageUrl.description: URL to an optional single image associated with the post.

linkedEventId.description: Reference to an optional Event linked to this post. (Relationship: Event 1:N Post)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the post was created.

isSystemPost.description: Indicates if the post was automatically generated by the system (e.g., event created, member joined).

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: Represents a comment made on a feed post within a team's activity feed.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Comment entity.

postId.description: Reference to the Post this comment belongs to. (Relationship: Post 1:N Comment)

authorId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who authored this comment. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Comment)

content.description: The text content of the comment.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the comment was created.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: Represents a scheduled event for a specific team, managed by admins.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Event entity.

teamId.description: Reference to the Team this event belongs to. (Relationship: Team 1:N Event)

startTime.description: The start time of the event.

endTime.description: The optional end time of the event.

location.description: The location where the event will take place.

description.description: A detailed description of the event.

createdBy.description: Reference to the UserProfile (Admin) who created this event. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Event)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the event was created.

Rsvp.title: Rsvp
Rsvp.description: Records a user's RSVP status for a specific event, indicating their attendance intention.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Rsvp entity.

eventId.description: Reference to the Event this RSVP is for. (Relationship: Event 1:N Rsvp)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who submitted this RSVP. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Rsvp)

status.description: The user's RSVP status for the event (Going, Not Going, or Maybe).

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the RSVP was last updated.

Availability.title: Availability
Availability.description: Tracks a user's declared unavailability for specific dates within a team, aiding in event planning.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Availability entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who marked themselves unavailable. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Availability)

teamId.description: Reference to the Team for which the user is marking unavailability. (Relationship: Team 1:N Availability)

date.description: The specific date for which the user is unavailable.

File.title: File
File.description: Represents a shared file uploaded by a user within a team.

id.description: Unique identifier for the File entity.

teamId.description: Reference to the Team this file belongs to. (Relationship: Team 1:N File)

fileUrl.description: URL to the stored file in cloud storage.

fileName.description: The original name of the uploaded file.

uploadedBy.description: Reference to the UserProfile who uploaded this file. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N File)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the file was uploaded.

GroupChat.title: GroupChat
GroupChat.description: Represents a group chat within a team, facilitating real-time communication among selected members.

id.description: Unique identifier for the GroupChat entity.

teamId.description: Reference to the Team this chat belongs to. (Relationship: Team 1:N GroupChat)

name.description: The name of the group chat.

createdBy.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created this group chat. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N GroupChat)

memberIds.description: References to UserProfile members participating in this chat. (Relationship: UserProfile N:N GroupChat)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the group chat was created.

isDeleted.description: Flag indicating if the chat has been globally deleted by an admin.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Represents a single message or poll within a group chat, supporting various content types.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChatMessage entity.

chatId.description: Reference to the GroupChat this message belongs to. (Relationship: GroupChat 1:N ChatMessage)

authorId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who sent this message. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N ChatMessage)

type.description: The type of the chat message (text or poll).

content.description: The text content of the message (if type is 'text').

pollId.description: Reference to the Poll associated with this message (if type is 'poll'). (Relationship: Poll 1:N ChatMessage)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the message was sent.

UserChatHidden.title: UserChatHidden
UserChatHidden.description: Records a user's choice to hide a specific group chat from their personal view, without affecting others.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserChatHidden entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who hid the chat. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N UserChatHidden)

chatId.description: Reference to the GroupChat that was hidden. (Relationship: GroupChat 1:N UserChatHidden)

hiddenAt.description: Timestamp when the user hid the chat.

Poll.title: Poll
Poll.description: Represents a poll created within a group chat for quick decision-making among members.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Poll entity.

chatId.description: Reference to the GroupChat this poll belongs to. (Relationship: GroupChat 1:N Poll)

question.description: The question posed in the poll.

options.description: An array of possible answer options for the poll.

createdBy.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created this poll. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Poll)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the poll was created.

isClosed.description: Indicates if the poll is closed and no longer accepting votes.

PollVote.title: PollVote
PollVote.description: Records a user's vote for a specific option within a poll.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PollVote entity.

pollId.description: Reference to the Poll this vote is for. (Relationship: Poll 1:N PollVote)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who cast this vote. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N PollVote)

selectedOptionIndex.description: The 0-based index of the option selected by the user in the poll's options array.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the vote was last updated.

definition.description: Stores individual user profile information. Access is restricted to the user whose ID matches the `userId` in the path and the `profileId` (which should be identical to `userId`). This collection enforces path-based ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user (from Firebase Auth `request.auth.uid`).

params.name: profileId
params.description: The unique ID of the user's profile, which must match `userId`.

definition.description: Top-level collection for all team-related data. Access to a team document is granted to any authenticated user who is a member of that team (checked via `team_memberships`).

params.name: teamId
params.description: The unique identifier for the team.

definition.description: A flat collection storing user-to-team membership and role information. Document IDs are typically composed as `{teamId}_{userId}`. This collection is crucial for authorization and acts as a global ACL (Access Control List) for all team-scoped data. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'teamId' for querying and rule efficiency.

params.name: teamMembershipId
params.description: The unique identifier for the team membership, typically in the format '{teamId}_{userId}'.

definition.description: Posts within a specific team's activity feed. Access is limited to members of the `teamId`. Includes denormalized 'teamId' for authorization independence.

params.name: teamId
params.description: The unique ID of the team this post belongs to.

params.name: postId
params.description: The unique ID of the post.

definition.description: Comments on a specific team post. Access is limited to members of the `teamId`. Includes denormalized 'teamId' for authorization independence.

params.name: teamId
params.description: The unique ID of the team this comment's parent post belongs to.

params.name: postId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent post.

params.name: commentId
params.description: The unique ID of the comment.

definition.description: Scheduled events for a specific team. Access is limited to members of the `teamId`. Only team admins can create, edit, or delete events. Includes denormalized 'teamId' for authorization independence.

params.name: teamId
params.description: The unique ID of the team this event belongs to.

params.name: eventId
params.description: The unique ID of the event.

definition.description: User RSVP status for a specific event. The document ID is the `userId` to ensure one RSVP per user per event. Access is limited to members of the `teamId`. Includes denormalized 'teamId' and 'eventId' for authorization independence.

params.name: teamId
params.description: The unique ID of the team this event's parent belongs to.

params.name: eventId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent event.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who submitted the RSVP.

definition.description: User-declared unavailability for specific dates, scoped per team. Access to create/update is restricted to the owning `userId`. Admins of the specified `teamId` can read these entries. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'teamId' for efficient querying and authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who marked unavailability.

params.name: availabilityId
params.description: The unique ID for the availability entry.

definition.description: Shared files uploaded within a specific team. Access is limited to members of the `teamId`. Includes denormalized 'teamId' for authorization independence.

params.name: teamId
params.description: The unique ID of the team this file belongs to.

params.name: fileId
params.description: The unique ID of the file.

definition.description: Group chats within a specific team. Access is limited to members of the `teamId` and specifically to users listed in the `memberIds` array. Includes denormalized 'teamId' for authorization independence and 'memberIds' for chat-specific authorization.

params.name: teamId
params.description: The unique ID of the team this chat belongs to.

params.name: chatId
params.description: The unique ID of the group chat.

definition.description: Messages within a specific group chat. Access is limited to chat members. **CRITICAL:** Includes denormalized 'teamId', 'chatId', and 'memberIds' (copied from the parent `GroupChat` document) for complete authorization independence, ensuring `list` operations are secure without requiring `get()` on the parent `GroupChat`.

params.name: teamId
params.description: The unique ID of the team this chat's parent belongs to.

params.name: chatId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent group chat.

params.name: messageId
params.description: The unique ID of the chat message.

definition.description: Records a user's choice to hide a specific group chat from their view. Access is restricted to the `userId` in the path. The document ID is the `chatId` for direct lookup. Includes denormalized 'userId', 'chatId', and 'teamId' for authorization independence and query efficiency.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who hid the chat.

params.name: chatId
params.description: The unique ID of the chat that was hidden (also the document ID).

definition.description: Polls created within a specific group chat. Access is limited to chat members. **CRITICAL:** Includes denormalized 'teamId', 'chatId', and 'memberIds' (copied from the parent `GroupChat` document) for complete authorization independence, ensuring secure access without requiring `get()` on the parent `GroupChat`.

params.name: teamId
params.description: The unique ID of the team this chat's parent belongs to.

params.name: chatId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent group chat.

params.name: pollId
params.description: The unique ID of the poll.

definition.description: Records a user's vote for a specific poll option. The document ID is the `userId` to ensure one vote per user per poll. Access is limited to chat members. **CRITICAL:** Includes denormalized 'teamId', 'chatId', 'pollId', and 'memberIds' (copied from the parent `GroupChat` document) for complete authorization independence, ensuring secure access without requiring `get()` on parent documents.

params.name: teamId
params.description: The unique ID of the team this poll's parent belongs to.

params.name: chatId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent group chat.

params.name: pollId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent poll.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who cast the vote (also the document ID).

definition.description: Stores user-specific in-app notifications. This replaces the problematic `/teams/{teamId}/alerts` path. Access is strictly restricted to the `userId` in the path. Includes denormalized 'userId' and optionally 'teamId' for context, ensuring authorization independence for list operations.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user receiving the notification.

params.name: notificationId
params.description: The unique ID for the notification entry.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to address the "permission-denied" error on the `/teams/{teamId}/alerts` path by introducing a user-specific notifications collection and by strictly adhering to the core design principles, especially Authorization Independence.

**Authorization Independence:**
1.  **Path-Based Ownership:** For user-specific data (e.g., `UserProfile`, `Availability`, `UserChatHidden`, and the newly introduced `UserNotifications`), authorization is achieved by embedding the `userId` directly into the path (`/users/{userId}/...`). This allows security rules to simply check `request.auth.uid == userId`, ensuring data privacy without any `get()` calls.
2.  **Team Membership (Global ACL):** For team-scoped data, membership and roles (`Admin` or `Member`) are stored in a dedicated, flat collection: `/team_memberships/{teamId}_{userId}`. This collection acts as a global Access Control List (ACL) for all team-related data. Security rules for team-scoped collections (like `posts`, `events`, `files`) will verify `request.auth.uid` is a member of the relevant `teamId` by performing an `exists()` check against this flat `team_memberships` collection. This approach is considered a compliant interpretation of "Authorization Independence" for global ACLs, differentiating it from `get()` calls that traverse parent-child document hierarchies, which can break atomic operations and complicate debugging.
3.  **Chat-Specific Membership Denormalization (Strict Adherence):** For entities within the `GroupChat` hierarchy (`ChatMessage`, `Poll`, `PollVote`), access is strictly dependent on the `memberIds` array of the parent `GroupChat`. To comply with the mandate "attributes MUST be copied into every document in the subcollection" and avoid `get()` calls on parent documents for authorization, the `memberIds` array from the `GroupChat` document will be denormalized into every `ChatMessage`, `Poll`, and `PollVote` document. While this increases data redundancy and update complexity for `memberIds` changes, it ensures complete authorization independence for each document, as explicitly required by the design principles. The `teamId` will also be denormalized into subcollection documents (e.g., `Comment`, `Rsvp`, `ChatMessage`) to facilitate direct queries and reduce rule complexity.

**QAPs (Query as a Permission):**
*   **Structural Segregation:** Data with different security postures is separated into distinct collections. For example, private user data is under `/users/{userId}/...`, while collaborative team data is under `/teams/{teamId}/...`. This ensures that `list` operations naturally return only authorized data.
*   **Explicit Parameters:** All paths use descriptive wildcards (e.g., `{teamId}`, `{userId}`), allowing rules to validate path parameters against `request.auth.uid` or denormalized `teamId` fields.
*   **Denormalization:** The denormalization of `teamId` into subcollection documents, and crucially, `memberIds` into chat-related subcollections, ensures that `list` queries can execute securely without filtering at the rule level. For example, listing messages in a chat can directly check `request.auth.uid in resource.data.memberIds` on each message, or listing posts for a team can verify `exists(/team_memberships/$(teamId)_$(request.auth.uid))` without needing to filter results.

**Addressing the `alerts` error:**
*   The `/teams/{teamId}/alerts` path, which caused the permission error, is not part of this design. The existing error indicates the client was trying to read a collection that either doesn't exist or isn't intended for direct client reads in a team context.
*   Instead, an `UserNotification` entity has been introduced at `/users/{userId}/notifications/{notificationId}`. This collection will store in-app notifications, accessible only by the owning `userId`, resolving the security concern by making notifications user-specific and preventing unauthorized team-wide `list` operations on a non-existent or misdesigned `alerts` collection. Push notifications via FCM remain a backend concern, leveraging user notification preferences stored in `UserProfile`.
